'''ngazongo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:scalawag|scalawag]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-z-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:scalawag|scalawag]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| ngazongo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngæzengeth|ngæzengeth]] || [[word:ngæzengej|ngæzengej]] || [[word:ngæzengesh|ngæzengesh]] || [[word:ngæzenge|ngæzenge]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngazozongoth|ngazozongoth]] || [[word:ngazozongoj|ngazozongoj]] || [[word:ngazozongosh|ngazozongosh]] || [[word:ngazozongo|ngazozongo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngazongoth|ngazongoth]] || [[word:ngazongoj|ngazongoj]] || [[word:ngazongosh|ngazongosh]] || [[word:ngazongo|ngazongo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngazofngoth|ngazofngoth]] || [[word:ngazofngoj|ngazofngoj]] || [[word:ngazofngosh|ngazofngosh]] || [[word:ngazofngof|ngazofngof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngazongotho|ngazongotho]] || [[word:ngazongojo|ngazongojo]] || [[word:ngazongosho|ngazongosho]] || [[word:ngazongoko|ngazongoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngazongoth|ngazongoth]] || [[word:ngazongoj|ngazongoj]] || [[word:ngazongosh|ngazongosh]] || [[word:ngazongo|ngazongo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngazongothol|ngazongothol]] || [[word:ngazongojol|ngazongojol]] || [[word:ngazongoshol|ngazongoshol]] || [[word:ngazongokol|ngazongokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngazongothotho|ngazongothotho]] || [[word:ngazongojojo|ngazongojojo]] || [[word:ngazongoshosho|ngazongoshosho]] || [[word:ngazongoko|ngazongoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngazongothon|ngazongothon]] || [[word:ngazongojon|ngazongojon]] || [[word:ngazongoshon|ngazongoshon]] || [[word:ngazongokon|ngazongokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngazongothoro|ngazongothoro]] || [[word:ngazongojoro|ngazongojoro]] || [[word:ngazongoshoro|ngazongoshoro]] || [[word:ngazongokoro|ngazongokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
